DataSource.SQL:
DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor'), ('ITSMOperator');
DECLARE @LastTreeIdent VARCHAR(900) = (SELECT COALESCE(@ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident, @ITSMCompanyIdent))
DECLARE @ITSMCategoryBreakdownID INT = ( SELECT ITSMCategoryBreakdownID FROM usr.ITSMCategory AS cat INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTreeView AS folTre ON folTre.TableID = cat.ID AND folTre.FormIdent = @FormIdent WHERE folTre.Ident = @LastTreeIdent )
;WITH BreakdownLeafs AS ( -- Listové uzly z ITSMCategoryBreakdownSubForm pro vybrané ITSMCategoryBreakdownID SELECT folTreBre.Ident, folTreBre.ParentFolderTreeID FROM usr.ITSMCategoryBreakdownSubForm AS catBreSub INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS folTreBre ON folTreBre.Ident = catBreSub.BreakdownFolderTreeIdent WHERE catBreSub.TableID = @ITSMCategoryBreakdownID AND catBreSub.FormIdent = 'ITSMCategoryBreakdown' AND catBreSub.[State] != @DeletedState ), Hierarchy AS ( SELECT Ident, ParentFolderTreeID, 1 AS IsSelectable FROM BreakdownLeafs
UNION ALL
SELECT parent.Ident, parent.ParentFolderTreeID, 0 AS IsSelectable FROM Hierarchy AS h INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS parent ON parent.ID = h.ParentFolderTreeID WHERE h.ParentFolderTreeID IS NOT NULL ) SELECT fot.Ident ,fol.[Name] ,fotP.Ident AS ParentIdent ,MAX(h.IsSelectable) AS IsSelectable FROM Hierarchy AS h INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fot ON fot.Ident = h.Ident INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID AND fol.[State] = @FolderActiveState LEFT JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fotP ON fotP.ID = fot.ParentFolderTreeID WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,'ITSMCommonFolderGroup','ITSMRequestSegment',@PermissionIDs) WHERE FolderTreeIdent = fot.Ident ) GROUP BY fot.Ident, fol.[Name], fotP.Ident ORDER BY fot.Ident
